title: Supabase management access token missing
affects: M3-T002 (durable content-addressed storage of the ORIGINAL HTML/PDF captures + raw hashes + manifests — required before acceptance)
M3-T003 (durable content-addressed storage of rendered pages + extraction/OCR evidence + human-review bundles — required before acceptance)
M3-T005 (durable content-addressed storage of the Construction-Code + amendment-overlay corpus — required before acceptance)
detail: Supabase MCP server is configured and resolves project URL https://dyiviaalkqxeyyxotvvh.supabase.co, but management operations return Unauthorized. Durable legal-corpus object storage depends on this token, split by the §17.16 ownership decision: M3-T002 stores the immutable ORIGINAL HTML/PDF captures (no rendering — T002 has no parser/renderer); M3-T003 stores rendered pages + extraction/OCR evidence + review bundles; M3-T005 stores the construction-code + amendment-overlay corpus. Each may develop and gate-review fixture/harness increments while this is open, but none may be ACCEPTED (nor mark its corpus domain 'implemented', nor satisfy a downstream dependency, nor unblock a feasibility claim) until its durable, content-addressed storage exists. This blocker therefore blocks acceptance of M3-T002, M3-T003, and M3-T005 while open (enforced by tools/project_control.py accept: an open blocker whose affects/detail names the task blocks acceptance). The cross-reference closure packet consumes already-stored verified evidence and is not itself a durable-bulk-storage task, so it is deliberately NOT named here; it is gated instead by its dependencies on the accepted capture and evidence tasks. (This record intentionally names only the three durable-storage tasks; the S9 regression asserts that exactly.)
exact_human_action: Create a personal access token at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens and add it to the Supabase MCP server configuration as SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN (Claude Code MCP settings), then restart the MCP connection. Do not paste the token into chat, code, or committed files.
where_to_enter: Claude Code MCP server configuration (environment of the supabase MCP server) or the harness secret store
minimum_permissions: Access to the target Supabase organization/projects; token scope is account-level (Supabase PATs are not scoped narrower today)
how_it_will_be_tested: mcp__supabase__list_tables on schema public; expected: table list or empty list, no Unauthorized error. No secret values will be printed.
